user.title: Video Call
user.description: Set up HA-native video calling. No configuration needed — endpoints, persons and rooms are discovered automatically.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only one instance is allowed.

data.turn_host: TURN server (host or host:port — required for calls across the internet/LTE)
data.turn_lan_host: TURN LAN address (optional — lets on-network clients skip NAT hairpin)
data.turn_stun: Use my TURN server for STUN too
data.allow_drop_in: Allow drop-in by default (per-device consent is set on each device's card)
data.answer_dashboard: Dashboard path for mobile Answer deep link

data_description.turn_stun: Adds stun: entries for your TURN host(s) so you don't need the Advanced ICE JSON. coturn and most self-hosted TURN servers answer STUN on the same port.

data.ice_servers: Extra ICE servers (JSON array of RTCIceServer)

data_description.ice_servers: Override the ICE server list. Blank = default STUN (or your "Use my TURN server for STUN" setting) plus your TURN. Enter [] for no default ICE servers. Always merged with your TURN settings.

abort.pruned: Removed {count} offline endpoint(s). Online devices were not touched.
